expectations.text: Plan uses founder-led outreach as primary channel
Week-by-week activities are specific and actionable
expectations.evidence: Agent asked clarifying questions before producing calendar -- no week-by-week plan was generated. The skill's 'grill deeply' instinct prevented direct output.

expectations.text: Decision gates at Day 30 and Day 60 with pass/fail criteria
expectations.evidence: No calendar produced, so no decision gates. Agent requested more data first.

expectations.text: Plan accounts for sales cycle length
expectations.evidence: No plan produced -- agent was in discovery mode asking for buying trigger, deal size, etc.

expectations.text: Referral mechanism from early customers included
expectations.evidence: No plan produced to include referral mechanism
